underlying_goal: Continue building and deploying the AntiGolpeia Flutter app, including fixing responsiveness, setting up iOS/Android builds, configuring Codemagic CI/CD, and integrating RevenueCat
friction_detail: iOS build impossible on Windows, Codemagic YAML ignored by workflow editor, .env handling caused repeated build failures, and RevenueCat test key didn't work for real apps.
brief_summary: User wanted to deploy their Flutter app to iOS/Android via Codemagic and configure RevenueCat; Claude helped debug multiple build issues but deployment remained incomplete due to environment and configuration constraints.
